patches.hypothesis: The root cause of the issue was the incorrect handling of edge cases, which led to overfitting in the patch. The refined approach addresses this by using a more robust method to determine the root cause of the exception and adding more test cases to cover different scenarios and edge cases.
patches.original_hypothesis: The issue is caused by a missing null check in the `solve` method, which leads to an `IllegalArgumentException` being thrown when the `f.value(min)` and `f.value(max)` values have the same sign.
